cells.title: Overview
cells.source: This notebook captures the legacy SIMPLE EPIDEMIC MODEL as a runnable browser notebook. The original model used `DT = 0.25` days and a `TABLE(...)` contact lookup. In this notebook the quarter-day step is folded into per-step rates, the contact lookup is represented as a piecewise linear interpolation over the original table points, and the infection-flow calculation uses lagged stocks so the model runs as a stable explicit update in the current browser solver.

equations.name: susceptible_share
equations.desc: Lagged share of population still susceptible, used by the contact lookup.

equations.name: contacts
equations.desc: Piecewise linear contact function based on the original lookup table.
equations.expression: if (susceptible_share < 0.2) { 14 * susceptible_share } else { if (susceptible_share < 0.4) { 2.8 + 13.5 * (susceptible_share - 0.2) } else { if (susceptible_share < 0.6) { 5.5 + 12.5 * (susceptible_share - 0.4) } else { if (susceptible_share < 0.8) { 8 + 7.5 * (susceptible_share - 0.6) } else { 9.5 + 2.5 * (susceptible_share - 0.8) } } } }

equations.name: infections
equations.desc: New infections per simulation step from lagged stocks. The original daily infection rate is scaled by the quarter-day step.

equations.name: cure
equations.desc: Recoveries per simulation step from the lagged sick stock. The original daily cure rate is scaled by the quarter-day step.

externals.name: frsick_step
externals.desc: Per-step infection factor from the original `FRSICK = 0.05` with `DT = 0.25`.

externals.name: cure_rate_step
externals.desc: Per-step cure rate from the original `DUR = 10` days with `DT = 0.25`.

externals.name: total_population
externals.desc: Constant total population used in the lagged contact-share lookup.

cells.title: Baseline run
cells.description: Baseline epidemic run over 200 quarter-day steps, corresponding to 50 days.
